file_insights.purpose: Centralized public API for notification module with comprehensive exports
file_insights.pattern: Well-organized with section comments for module definition, service, repository, controller, routes, types, and schemas

file_insights.purpose: Module metadata and configuration following platform schema
key_features: Dependencies on auth, organization, user modules
Provides routes, events, hooks, permissions, services
Admin menu integration with icon and routing

file_insights.purpose: REST API controller for notification endpoints
Module setup and dependency injection configuration
file_insights.pattern: Uses tsyringe for DI, extends BaseModule

file_insights.purpose: Database abstraction layer for notification persistence
key_methods: list - List with pagination and filters
file_insights.filters: NotificationListFilters with status, type, read status, date range

file_insights.purpose: Business logic and orchestration for notification operations
Comprehensive TypeScript type definitions for notification module
type_categories: Event types: NotificationCreatedEvent, NotificationReadEvent, NotificationDeletedEvent, NotificationBroadcastEvent
Hook context types: BeforeSendContext, AfterSendContext, BeforeReadContext, AfterReadContext
enums: NotificationType: EMAIL, IN_APP, SMS, PUSH, SYSTEM

file_insights.purpose: Zod validation schemas for input validation and type safety
Route definitions and metadata for notification endpoints

patterns_discovered.name: Modular Architecture
patterns_discovered.description: Clean separation of concerns with controller, service, and repository layers

patterns_discovered.name: Comprehensive Type Safety
patterns_discovered.description: Extensive use of TypeScript types for both runtime and compile-time safety
evidence: 400+ lines of type definitions in notification.types.ts
Zod schema validation for all inputs

patterns_discovered.name: Event-Driven Architecture
patterns_discovered.description: Event emitters and hooks for extensibility and observability

patterns_discovered.name: Tiered Feature Support
patterns_discovered.description: Feature gates based on subscription tier in module.json

patterns_discovered.name: Comprehensive API Documentation
patterns_discovered.description: Well-documented endpoints with examples and descriptions

patterns_discovered.name: Pagination and Filtering
patterns_discovered.description: Flexible list operations with pagination and multi-criteria filtering
evidence: NotificationListParams with page, perPage, status, type

patterns_discovered.name: Multi-Channel Support
patterns_discovered.description: Architecture supports email, in-app, SMS, and push notifications
evidence: NotificationType enum with EMAIL, IN_APP, SMS, PUSH

patterns_discovered.name: Centralized Exports Pattern
patterns_discovered.description: Barrel export file providing clean public API
evidence: index.ts exports all public types, services, routes
Organized into logical sections with comments
Prevents deep imports from internal files

patterns_discovered.name: Admin Operations Separation
patterns_discovered.description: Separate routes and endpoints for admin broadcast operations

gotchas_discovered.description: MAX_MESSAGE_LENGTH is 5000 chars and MAX_TITLE_LENGTH is 255 chars, defined as constants
gotchas_discovered.impact: Client must truncate or validate before submission
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: messageSchema enforces limits, truncateMessage utility provided

gotchas_discovered.description: Module.json defaults emailProvider to 'smtp' but actual SMTP configuration is not visible in diffs
gotchas_discovered.impact: Email delivery depends on external SMTP configuration
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Likely configured in environment variables or settings

gotchas_discovered.description: No visible default page size or max results in diffs
gotchas_discovered.impact: Need to verify default pagination limits to prevent performance issues

gotchas_discovered.description: GET /api/v1/notifications/:id access controlled 'owner only' but implementation details not visible
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could expose data if ownership check is missing
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Controller should verify user.id matches notification owner

gotchas_discovered.description: Admin broadcast endpoint requires elevated permissions not explicitly shown
gotchas_discovered.impact: Misconfiguration could allow unauthorized bulk notifications

gotchas_discovered.description: Service supports retry logic (maxRetries: 3, retryDelay: 60000) but retry strategy not in diffs
gotchas_discovered.impact: Failed emails may not be properly queued or reported
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Need to verify retry implementation in service

gotchas_discovered.description: NotificationStatus has PENDING, SENT, FAILED, DELIVERED but state transitions not documented
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could result in invalid status transitions
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Service should enforce valid state transitions

gotchas_discovered.description: Service mentions rate limiting and throttling but implementation not visible
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could allow notification spam if not properly implemented
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Verify rate limit implementation in NotificationService

gotchas_discovered.description: NotificationMetadata type exists but structure and allowed fields not detailed in diffs
gotchas_discovered.impact: Could accept arbitrary metadata causing storage issues

gotchas_discovered.description: markAllAsRead endpoint could race condition with individual mark operations
gotchas_discovered.impact: Potential data inconsistency if not properly transactional
gotchas_discovered.mitigation: Repository implementation should use database transactions

approach_outcome.commit_message: auto-claude: subtask-9-2 - Create Notification module (email, in-app notifications)

recommendations.recommendation: Verify email provider configuration and SMTP setup
recommendations.rationale: Module declares email support but SMTP config not visible in diffs
action_items: Check environment variable configuration for SMTP credentials

recommendations.rationale: GET /api/v1/notifications/:id should only return notifications owned by current user
action_items: Ensure NotificationController checks ownership before returning
Add integration tests for ownership verification

recommendations.rationale: No test files visible in diffs despite complex business logic
action_items: Tests for event emission and hooks

recommendations.rationale: Prevent accidental large result sets from impacting performance

recommendations.recommendation: Document state transition rules for NotificationStatus
recommendations.rationale: PENDING → SENT → DELIVERED lifecycle should be enforced
action_items: Implement state transition validation in service

recommendations.rationale: Retry configuration exists but implementation strategy unclear
action_items: Implement dead-letter queue for permanently failed emails

recommendations.rationale: Module.json defines tiered feature support but implementation unclear
action_items: Implement feature flag checks in service layer
Add middleware for tier-based endpoint access control
Plan SMS and push notification implementations

recommendations.recommendation: Add database indexes for common queries
recommendations.rationale: Optimize list operations with filters on userId, status, type
action_items: Index on (userId, status, createdAt) for list queries
Index on (userId, status) for count queries
Consider partial index for unread notifications

recommendations.recommendation: Create runbook for notification system troubleshooting
action_items: Document common failure scenarios and resolutions

recommendations.rationale: Module declares dependencies on auth, organization, user modules
action_items: Verify auth module integration for user verification
Check organization context usage in notifications
